# FI Digital

> FI Digital is a US SMB transformation partner. We help operations-led, growth-stage, and data-ambitious mid-market companies modernize business systems, ship digital products, deploy AI workers, and unify data — as one execution partner.

Headquarters: Atlanta, Georgia, USA
Legal entity: FI Digital LLC
Serving: US SMB and mid-market (25-500 employees)
Delivery: US-based account leads, global engineering bench

## Services

- [Zoho Implementation Stack](https://fidigital.com/solutions/zoho-implementation/): Zoho Premium Partner. CRM, marketing automation, service ops, Zoho One rollouts, managed support, optimization.
- [Product Engineering](https://fidigital.com/solutions/product-engineering/): Discovery sprints, MVP builds, customer portals, internal workflow apps, app modernization, integration engineering.
- [AI and Digital Workers](https://fidigital.com/solutions/ai-digital-workers/): AI opportunity workshops, one-workflow AI pilots, support copilots, internal knowledge assistants, document AI, human-in-the-loop automation.
- [Data Engineering](https://fidigital.com/solutions/data-engineering/): Data foundation assessments, ETL / ELT modernization, Databricks lakehouse, Snowflake analytics, governance, BI acceleration.

## Industries

- [Professional Services](https://fidigital.com/industries/professional-services/)
- [Manufacturing and Distribution](https://fidigital.com/industries/manufacturing-distribution/)
- [Logistics and Field Service](https://fidigital.com/industries/logistics-field-service/)
- [Financial Services](https://fidigital.com/industries/financial-services/)

## Starting Offers

- Zoho CRM QuickStart (starting at a fixed fee)
- Product Discovery Sprint (two weeks, fixed fee)
- One-Workflow AI Pilot (fixed fee)
- Data Foundation Assessment (fixed fee)
- Managed Services (monthly starting point)

## Proof

- Zoho Premium Partner
- 200+ projects delivered across 10 years
- SOC 2 Type II aligned delivery practices
- US-based account leads, globally distributed engineering bench
